message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate emit() patterns to structured helpers

- comp_conditions.zig: Add emitPyTruthy, emitToBool, emitPyTruthyWithSubs, emitToBoolWithSubs helpers
- datetime.zig: Migrate genTimedelta, genStrftime, genMethodStrftime to emitCallCtx
- dispatch.zig: Migrate .custom case in generateCLibraryCall to emitCallCtx

Reduces raw emit(")") patterns from 172 to 165 for guaranteed bracket matching.
